mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (appointment_no, patient_id, slot_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_date, period, slot_seq, register_fee, order_status, visit_status, is_revisit, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{appointmentNo}, #{patientId}, #{slotId}, #{scheduleId}, #{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{period}, #{slotSeq}, #{registerFee}, #{orderStatus}, #{visitStatus}, COALESCE(#{isRevisit}, 0), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, appointment_no, patient_id, slot_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_date, period, slot_seq, register_fee, order_status, visit_status, is_revisit, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, appointment_no, patient_id, slot_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_date, period, slot_seq, register_fee, order_status, visit_status, is_revisit, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE appointment_no = #{appointmentNo}

SELECT id, appointment_no, patient_id, slot_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_date, period, slot_seq, register_fee, order_status, visit_status, is_revisit, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE slot_id = #{slotId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, appointment_no, patient_id, slot_id, schedule_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_date, period, slot_seq, register_fee, order_status, visit_status, is_revisit, cancel_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.appointment_no, a.patient_id, a.slot_id, a.schedule_id, a.doctor_id, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, a.department_id, dep.dept_name AS department_name, a.appointment_date, a.period, a.slot_seq, s.slot_start, s.slot_end, a.register_fee, a.order_status, a.visit_status, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN department dep ON a.department_id = dep.id LEFT JOIN slot s ON a.slot_id = s.id WHERE a.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.appointment_no, a.patient_id, a.slot_id, a.schedule_id, a.doctor_id, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, a.department_id, dep.dept_name AS department_name, a.appointment_date, a.period, a.slot_seq, s.slot_start, s.slot_end, a.register_fee, a.order_status, a.visit_status, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN department dep ON a.department_id = dep.id LEFT JOIN slot s ON a.slot_id = s.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment a INNER JOIN slot s ON a.slot_id = s.id SET a.order_status = 'CANCELLED', a.cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, a.cancel_time = NOW(), a.update_time = NOW() WHERE s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND a.order_status = 'PENDING_PAY'
